summary:
Early-onset colorectal cancer is a distinct clinical entity due to its strong link to hereditary syndromes, microsatellite instability (MSI-H), mucinous histology, and right-sided tumor locations. These molecular and pathological characteristics differ significantly from those seen in conventional sporadic colorectal cancer.  

\boxed{A}

\boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
